title: Odyssey
description: Odyssey is a mythology-themed content expansion implementing 12 unique classes and progression paths!
body:
## Overview
Odyssey is a mythology-themed content expansion implementing 12 unique classes and progression paths! With multiplayer in mind, each class provides benefits to your party of players, from the peaceful crofter to the brutal warmonger. Unique mobs, equipment, crops, decorations, redstone, and cosmetics are peppered throughout the world of Minecraft breathing new life. New structures enhance gameplay with interactive builds and Zelda-inspired dungeon generation. Delve into nonlinear paths using new loot such as boomerangs, grappling hooks, and keys. Odyssey dungeons encourage backtracking to uncover previously inaccessible challenges. Join the new multiplayer RPG, Odyssey.
